name: io.github.vcoder25/vugola-mcp
description: Official MCP server for Vugola — clip videos, check credits, and schedule posts to 8 social platforms (X, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky).

environmentVariables.name: VUGOLA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Vugola API key (prefix vug_sk_). Get one at https://www.vugolaai.com/dashboard/api-key. Requires a paid Vugola plan.
